mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INQUIRY_FILES( INQUIRY_FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, STORAGE_PATH, ATTACH_TARGET, INQUIRY_ID ) VALUES( SEQ_INQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{storagePath}, #{attachTarget}, #{inquiryId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId, TITLE, CONTENT, ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY INQUIRY_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, ANSWERED_AT AS answeredAt FROM INQUIRIES WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}

SELECT I.INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId, I.TITLE, I.CONTENT, I.ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, I.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN STORES S ON I.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE I.DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND I.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND I.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(I.INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY I.INQUIRY_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRIES SET ANSWER_CONTENT = NULL, ANSWERED_AT = NULL WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}
